name: kubeleash
description: kubeleash — a Kubernetes MCP server with RBAC-style, context-scoped guardrails for AI agents, plus skills that teach agents how to query and act on clusters safely.

plugins.name: kubeleash
plugins.description: Kubernetes MCP server with RBAC-style, context-scoped guardrails for AI agents. Requires the `kubeleash` binary on PATH (brew install kubeleash/tap/kubeleash, or go install).
